meta: Aqua HK halved Meta spend WoW (HK$9,255 to HK$4,623) yet schedules only fell 12 to 10, so cost per schedule improved sharply.
Dim Sum Library nearly doubled Meta spend (HK$538 to HK$1,018) and schedules jumped 2 to 9, the best efficiency in the portfolio.
Meta remains a thin channel for both venues: 19 schedules combined against 341 GA4 bookings.
google: Aqua HK Google is the workhorse: HK$8,477 spend and 58.7 booking conversions, CPA HK$144, inside the good band.
Dim Sum Library delivers 47 conversions on just HK$1,193, by far the cheapest acquisition in the portfolio.
Google now drives roughly 31 percent of the two venues' GA4 bookings.
ga4: Aqua HK bookings recovered to 204 from 166, ahead of the 185 weekly target, but YTD is still 7.5 percent behind.
Dim Sum Library booked 137 against a 172 target, a 20 percent miss, and is 4.9 percent behind YTD.
DSL user CVR of 9.2 percent is strong, so the shortfall is a traffic problem rather than a conversion problem.
